heading: Discretionary power to transfer management
label: 499 Discretionary power to transfer management
text: Whenever any legally organized water-users’ association or irrigation district shall so request, the Secretary of the Interior is authorized, in his discretion, to transfer to such water-users’ association or irrigation district the care, operation, and maintenance of all or any part of the project works, subject to such rules and regulations as he may prescribe.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of part of first sentence of section 5 of act . Remainder of first sentence and second sentence of such section 5 are classified to .Aug. 13, 1914section 492 of this title
